title: Rack B energy investigation and recommendation
query_text: Rack B is consuming 84% more energy than its baseline. Investigate the cause and recommend corrective actions.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Rack B draws 156 kWh vs. an 85 kWh baseline (84% over). The rack_layout.csv shows 16 compute nodes in Rack B; the rack_energy_summary.md indicates heavy sustained utilisation rather than a hardware fault signature. Recommended actions: (1) verify that no abnormal idle power draw is present by checking per-node breakdown; (2) confirm that the elevated load is expected from active jobs; (3) if sustained above baseline for >48 h without corresponding job load, raise a facility inspection ticket. No immediate emergency action is warranted given the rack is within absolute power limits.
